programs.title: Inside Barlinnie
programs.desc: Billy's new start is on a knife edge, and Alan is tempted back to his old ways. Contains some strong language.

programs.title: This is BBC Two
programs.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programs.title: Beechgrove Garden
programs.desc: Kirsty Wilson and Brian Cunningham start growing a wide variety of edible produce, and Brian provides an update on the veg he sowed at the start of the series.

programs.title: Great Japanese Railway Journeys
programs.desc: Michael explores the history of Hokkaido's indigenous Ainu people.

programs.title: Farm 999
programs.desc: Fly-tippers are caught by angry farmers in Warwickshire. Grazing land and livestock in the Mourne mountains face raging fires, and Paul Colgan meets a domestic abuse survivor.

programs.title: Lost and Found in the Lakes
programs.desc: The team rake over a jetty, desperately seeking a treasured lost ring, and social media detective Mui gets creative, hoping to trace the owner of a phone found in the depths.
